title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
